description_long: This object is a classic semi-automatic pistol, visually reminiscent of the Luger P08, featuring a distinct toggle-lock mechanism on its upper receiver. The frame and barrel are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal, with a long, slender barrel extending from the main body. The grip is angled and ergonomically shaped, likely made from a hard, textured material for secure handling. The trigger guard is rounded, and the trigger itself is visible within. The top of the receiver shows a raised sight post, and the rear sight is integrated into the toggle assembly. The overall design is compact and streamlined, suitable for one-handed operation and urban environments.
description: A dark, matte-finished semi-automatic pistol with a long barrel, toggle-lock mechanism, and ergonomic grip, resembling a Luger P08.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel's muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the pistol.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the toggle-lock mechanism, long barrel, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the grip, rear sight, and the toggle assembly.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other side of the toggle-lock, grip, and barrel.
